subject: [PATCH v5 2/2] mm: use mapping_max_folio_order() for force_thp_readahead order

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: The original author posted this patch as part of a series, and it seems to be a straightforward modification to allow VM_HUGEPAGE mappings to engage in large-folio readahead on certain configurations.

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch modifies the force_thp_readahead path in do_sync_mmap_readahead() to use mapping_max_folio_order() instead of a compile-time check. This allows VM_HUGEPAGE mappings to engage in large-folio readahead on configurations where HPAGE_PMD_ORDER exceeds MAX_PAGECACHE_ORDER.
